name: Chang's Hot & Sour Soup
recipeIngredient: 5 oz bean curd (about 1/3 of a 1 lb package, cut into thin one-inch slices)
3/4 tsp Chinese red hot pepper sauce
1 tbsp cornstarch, blended with 4 tbsp water
1/2 cup thin strips of fresh pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the chicken broth to boiling.
2. Add the pork strips, bamboo shoots, wood ear mushrooms (drained), bean curd, and sliced mushrooms to the pot. Return to a boil.
3. Stir in salt, soy sauce, sugar, white pepper, red pepper sauce, and vinegar, stirring continuously.
4. Continue cooking for a total of 20 minutes.
5. Mix in the cornstarch mixture and keep stirring until the soup thickens.
6. Gently pour the beaten eggs over the top.
7. Turn off the heat and gently stir the eggs into the soup.
8. Add sesame oil.
9. Serve in bowls, garnished with chopped green onions if desired.
